title: Upon Bunce. Epig.
content:
Money thou ow'st me; prethee fix a day
    For payment promis'd, though thou never pay:
    Let it be Dooms-day; nay, take longer scope;
    Pay when th'art honest; let me have some hope.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Bunce. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
